mapper.sql:
h.id ,u.username ,kakao_user_id, AES_DECRYPT(FROM_BASE64(u.phone_number), 'tb_mbm_user') phoneNumber ,p.user_id ,h.point_id ,h.dr_cr ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_drcr', h.dr_cr) AS drCrName /* DR:차변, CR:대변 */ ,h.cr_point_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.cr_point_type) AS crPointTypeName /* 대변, 적립 자본증가 */ ,h.dr_point_type ,GET_CODE_NAME('point_type', h.dr_point_type) AS drPointTypeName /* 차변, 지급 소멸 */ ,h.admin_gift_yn ,h.amount ,h.avail_amount ,h.memo
,h.expiration_period_yn ,h.create_date ,h.create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(h.create_id) AS createName

where.if: AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.kakao_user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: /* getPointHistoryCount */ SELECT count(1) FROM tb_mbm_user u INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id

SELECT
FROM tb_mbm_user u INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point p ON u.id = p.user_id INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id WHERE h.id = #{searchHistoryId}

/* getPointTotInfo */ SELECT COALESCE(inBoundSum, 0) AS inBoundSum , COALESCE(dedSum, 0) AS dedSum , COALESCE(remSum, 0) AS remSum , COALESCE((inBoundSum - remSum), 0) AS outBoundSum FROM ( SELECT SUM( CASE when cr_point_type != 'DED' THEN amount END ) AS inBoundSum ,SUM( CASE when cr_point_type = 'DED' THEN amount END ) AS dedSum ,SUM( CASE when cr_point_type = 'DED' THEN 0 ELSE avail_amount END ) AS remSum FROM tb_mbm_point p INNER JOIN tb_mbm_point_history h ON p.id = h.point_id AND p.user_id = #{searchUserId} ) a
